records.scenario: Thirty independently owned sessions retain owner identity, attention, child, selection, recap, history, and scrolling state.
records.profileVersion: fixture contract; live Product/Host version not captured
records.expected: Concurrent source observations remain separate; no display metadata joins owners.
records.observed: Deterministic AB-146 workload is retained; no rendered native capture.
records.fallback: Native Claude Code/iTerm2 Host remains the source of truth.

records.scenario: Duplicate, reordered, and gapped Codex CLI observations do not manufacture completion or cross an owner.
records.profileVersion: reviewed hooks-v1 fixture; live Product/Host version not captured
records.expected: Gap/reorder projects unresolved and no action authority.
records.fallback: Native Codex CLI/Warp Host; inspect unresolved work there.

records.scenario: Cursor integration intent, exact-entry ownership, and degraded health stay independent.
records.profileVersion: Cursor Hooks v1 fixture; live Cursor version not captured
records.expected: Enabled intent never claims Active; unknown/drifted capability degrades honestly.
records.fallback: Native Cursor Host and manual exact-entry remedy.

records.scenario: Negotiated Codex app-server capability is version- and epoch-scoped.
records.profileVersion: codex-cli 0.144.6 schema review; live current version unverified
records.expected: Digest/version mismatch disables only the affected capability and retires leases.
records.fallback: Native Codex/Orca Host; no generic control route.

records.scenario: Selected-display Island Overlay presents attention without activation or duplicate/disruptive presentation.
records.profileVersion: ACP fixture contract; live Cursor version not captured
records.expected: No stale or duplicate control; unavailable display/quiet scene withdraws the visible and AX region.
records.observed: Model/test seam exists; native rendered/AX review is absent.
records.fallback: Keep the native Cursor Host focused; present no overlay when unavailable.

records.scenario: A Claude Code approval, denial, answer, or plan action consumes one live owner-bound lease.
records.profileVersion: reviewed Hook contract; live executable version not captured
records.expected: No cross-owner or stale dispatch; indeterminate is not applied; persistent scope needs separate confirmation.
records.observed: Deterministic routing evidence only; accessible action surface is unrecorded.
records.fallback: Respond in the native Claude Code Host / Jump Back.

records.scenario: iTerm2 revalidates exact live pane/tab identity before Jump Back.
records.profileVersion: documented iTerm2 API fixture; live API/module version not captured
records.expected: Reports achieved exact level only after same-incarnation revalidation; never title/path guess.
records.observed: Controlled seam only; live pointer/keyboard/VoiceOver capture absent.
records.fallback: Open iTerm2 natively and state unavailable/exact-tab result honestly.

records.scenario: Cursor Host navigation rejects duplicate/native-incompatible terminal evidence.
records.profileVersion: adapter fixture contract; live Cursor Host version not captured
records.expected: Duplicate or incompatible evidence lowers/withdraws navigation rather than selecting a lookalike.
records.fallback: Native Cursor Host; explicit app-only/unavailable result.

records.scenario: Warp offers only app-only or explicitly elected current-window best effort.
records.profileVersion: Warp AX boundary fixture; live Warp version not captured
records.expected: No implicit Accessibility request or pane/tab claim; restart/Space/full-screen falls back.
records.observed: Controlled boundary only; current computer-use target denied twice.
records.fallback: Activate Warp app only, or report unavailable.

records.scenario: Orca uses documented opaque runtime and terminal/tab evidence; child surface remains unproven.
records.profileVersion: installed CLI runtime ID observed; semantic runtime version unavailable
records.capability: exact tab only when documented live evidence proves it
records.expected: Restart/loss/duplicate never reuses a locator; no exact-surface claim without source proof.
records.observed: Read-only CLI probe and fixture evidence; no live switch capture.
records.fallback: Native Orca Host or exact-tab/unavailable wording.

records.scenario: Quiet Scene/filtering suppresses automatic presentation without losing local state or replaying alerts.
records.profileVersion: local notification-policy contract; live OS notification settings not captured
records.expected: No duplicate/disruptive presentation; state stays visible on deliberate inspection.
records.fallback: No automatic alert; inspect the native Host and local working set.

records.scenario: Restart, wake, display loss, and recovery invalidate authority/locators without losing active Product work.
records.profileVersion: recovery contract; live wake/display sequence not captured
records.expected: No active-work cleanup, source completion, stale action, or stale navigation; fresh probe required.
records.observed: Unit/fixture evidence only; restart/wake/display manual cells absent.
records.fallback: Native Host remains active; local state is unresolved/degraded until reproven.

records.scenario: Safely inactive Session History archives only overflow and retains sourced recap for inspection.
records.profileVersion: AB-146 workload contract; live History UI version not captured
records.expected: Never clean up active/attention/child work; recap is sourced and bounded.
records.observed: Headless store test only; History visual/AX capture absent.
records.fallback: Keep in working set and use native Host; no destructive local cleanup.

records.scenario: Usage Snapshot displays only sourced provider data and says unavailable otherwise.
records.profileVersion: schema allowlist; live provider usage capability not captured
records.expected: No billing/quota estimate or invented value; missing source renders unavailable.
records.fallback: Usage unavailable; consult the native Product account/Host.
